turns.user_message: I just sat in my car for twenty minutes after I parked this morning. I couldn't make myself go inside.
That feeling in the car has become my whole week. I'm just going through the motions without any real feeling.
I'm starting to feel like a complete stranger to myself. My own thoughts and reactions just feel hollow and far away.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment.
